allow: Bash(node -e "const d=JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\)\); console.log\('strokes:', d.strokes?.length\); console.log\('medians:', JSON.stringify\(d.medians?.slice\(0,2\)\)\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('/tmp/ming.json'\); console.log\('strokes:', d.strokes?.length\); console.log\('medians[0]:', JSON.stringify\(d.medians[0]\)\); console.log\('medians[1]:', JSON.stringify\(d.medians[1]\)\); console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(d\)\)")
